story: 57% of enterprises have watched AI agents be confidently wrong. The fix is an agentic context layer, but who has one?
title: AI Mistakes Happen
script: 57% of enterprises have seen AI agents confidently provide incorrect answers. This matters because it hinders productivity and decision-making, causing significant losses. A key issue is the lack of an agentic context layer, which is crucial for accurate decision-making. Many companies are struggling to find a solution, and the consequences are severe. As AI adoption continues to grow, the need for a reliable context layer becomes more pressing, but who will develop a solution to this critical problem?
